release.name: Ban native Windows dau tien
notes: Chuyen toan bo ung dung tu Electron sang C# WinForms va chi dung control mac dinh cua Windows.
Port chuc nang xu ly PDF don Etsy, queue nhieu file, drag-drop va copy bang ket qua sang clipboard.
Phat hanh bang mot file .exe duy nhat tren GitHub Pages va cung cap release metadata qua release.json.
Ban moi co the duoc tai truc tiep trong app va chi can khoi dong lai de ap dung cap nhat.
